title: Create a Simple Flex Row
description: Create a flex container with 3 items arranged horizontally with equal spacing.
instructions:
1. Create a div with class 'container'
2. Add 3 child divs with class 'item'
3. Set display: flex on the container
4. Style each item with padding, background, and margin
hints: Use display: flex on the container
Add background and padding for visual clarity
validation: Items should appear in a horizontal row.

title: Compare Block vs Flex
description: Create two containers, one with block and one with flex, to see the difference.
instructions:
1. Create two parent divs
2. Add the same 3 items inside each
3. Use display: block on the first, display: flex on the second
4. Observe the layout difference
validation: Block items should stack vertically, flex items horizontally.

title: Inline-Flex Navigation
description: Create a navigation bar using inline-flex that sits inline with text.
instructions:
1. Create a paragraph with text before the nav
2. Create a nav container using display: inline-flex
3. Add 4 navigation links inside
4. Notice how inline-flex allows the nav to sit beside text
starterCode:
Welcome to our

Home About Services Contact
hints: Use display: inline-flex on the nav
Use gap for spacing between links
validation: The nav should be inline with the paragraph text.
